## Problem Statement
What user problem or opportunity does this solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature or change. Include acceptance criteria.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact & Priority
- Impact: [low/medium/high]
- Priority: [low/medium/high]

## Screenshots / Mockups
If applicable, add images or links.

## Additional Context
Links to related issues, PRDs, or discussions.
